title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Metro Shoes

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Metro Shoes
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Metro Shoes! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Metro Shoes:
Metro Shoes is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Shoes!
